## 📚 Documentation Issue

Describe the documentation issue or improvement needed.

## 📄 Affected Documentation

Which documentation is affected?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Wiki
- [ ] API Documentation (/docs)
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 🔍 Current State

What does the current documentation say (or not say)?

## ✏️ Proposed Change

What should the documentation say instead?

## 🎯 Why This Matters

Why is this documentation change important?

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked for existing documentation issues
- [ ] I have identified the specific location that needs updating
- [ ] I am willing to submit a PR with the changes
